projects_new_required_fields: Title, description, and Hackatime link are required
projects_edit_fix_url_errors_save: Please fix the URL errors before saving.
projects_edit_wait_url_checks: Please wait for URL checks to finish.
projects_edit_github_root_required: GitHub URL should point to the repository root (e.g. https://github.com/user/repo), not a specific file or page.
projects_edit_demo_url_unreachable: Hmm, something's not right. We couldn't reach your site — please make sure the URL is correct and reachable.
projects_edit_code_url_unreachable: Hmm, something's not right. We couldn't reach your repository — please make sure it's public and the URL is correct.
projects_edit_readme_url_unreachable: Hmm, something's not right. We couldn't reach your README — please make sure the URL is correct and reachable.
projects_edit_update_failed: Failed to update project. Please try again.
projects_edit_hackatime_update_failed: Failed to update Hackatime projects. Please try again.
projects_ship_personal_address_item: - Your mailing address (we use this address for record-keeping and statistics, and also to ship you prizes!)
projects_ship_personal_id_item_html: - Eligibility via. ID Verification (to ensure adults are not participating in Horizons, we need your ID to be checked through HCA. Horizons does not see your ID whatsoever)
projects_ship_personal_after_setup: Once you're done, hit the RE-AUTH button.
projects_ship_project_subtitle: Fill out this information and make sure it looks correct
projects_ship_project_approved_notice: This is an update to an approved project. Please note what was added/changed in your description.
projects_ship_project_prior_ysws_notice: This project was already submitted to another YSWS. If this is an update to that project, please clarify what was added/changed in your description.
projects_ship_project_resubmission_note: If this is a resubmission, please note what was updated from your previous submission.
projects_ship_project_fix_url_errors: Please fix the URL errors before continuing.
projects_ship_project_wait_url_checks: Please wait for URL checks to finish.
projects_ship_project_github_root_requir: GitHub URL should point to the repository root (e.g. https://github.com/user/repo), not a specific file or page.
projects_ship_project_demo_url_unreachab: Hmm, something's not right. We couldn't reach your site — please make sure the URL is correct and reachable.
projects_ship_project_code_url_unreachab: Hmm, something's not right. We couldn't reach your repository — please make sure it's public and the URL is correct.
projects_ship_project_readme_url_unreach: Hmm, something's not right. We couldn't reach your README — please make sure the URL is correct and reachable.
projects_ship_project_save_failed: Failed to save project. Please try again.
projects_ship_project_hackatime_update_f: Failed to update Hackatime projects. Please try again.
projects_ship_presubmit_requirements_blu: Every project submitted must be fully "shipped." Use the checklists below to confirm your project qualifies.
projects_ship_presubmit_check_link: You have an experienceable link (a URL where anyone can try your project now)
projects_ship_presubmit_check_screenshot: Your project has a screenshot uploaded (if it's difficult to experience, add a video to your README)
projects_ship_presubmit_check_descriptio: Your project description clearly explains what it does
projects_ship_presubmit_check_ai: AI use is declared in your project's README
projects_ship_finish_subtitle: Hit submit to submit your project. You won't be able to make any changes until your project is reviewed. You can resubmit your project once reviewed.
projects_ship_finish_submit_failed: Failed to submit project. Please try again.
projects_ship_integrity_warning: Don't cheat the time tracking system. No bots, no fake key presses, no UI manipulation. If you do, you'll be banned from Hackatime and other participating YSWS / events / programs
projects_ship_integrity_agree_blurb: By submitting your project to Horizons, you agree to the Hackatime Integrity Agreement.
